phase1.task_description:
Reprojection: loss of elevation when using pygeos 
With https://github.com/geopandas/geopandas/commit/5d1181af6bcca88351d84bb63fc0fbe0e32ce055 and pygeos support enabled, to_crs() transforms all geometries to 2-dimensions.

_vectorized.transform uses pygeos.get_coordinates, and the documentation mentions: Three-dimensional data is ignored.
